Defendant Pg&Es Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Verified First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Pg&E's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Verified First Amended Complaint -
Transferred to department 501 to be heard on the same date at the same time. That department handles all nuisance/trespass actions per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/ac

Defendant Pg & E'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Planitiffs' Verified First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PG & E'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLANITIFFS' VERIFIED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Astra Dea, paralegal of Gordon-Creed Kelley Holl & Sugarman, LLP (415.421.3100) for defendant and moving party; Alexander J. Perez of the Law Offices of Alexander J. Perez (415.682.2540) for plaintiff and responding party.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to prayer for punitive damages re: conscious disregard for life and safety. Plaintiffs and their counsel are ordered to comply with CCP 435.5 in future. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
